Interview Prep

DSA & Coding Interview Reference

Curated LeetCode problems organized by topic. Use the sidebar to jump to a category.

Arrays & Strings

Fundamental building blocks. Focus on index manipulation, prefix sums, and in-place operations.

  • 1. Two SumEasy
  • 121. Best Time to Buy and Sell StockEasy
  • 217. Contains DuplicateEasy
  • 238. Product of Array Except SelfMedium
  • 53. Maximum SubarrayMedium
  • 152. Maximum Product SubarrayMedium
  • 153. Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted ArrayMedium
  • 242. Valid AnagramEasy
  • 189. Rotate ArrayMedium
  • 42. Trapping Rain WaterHard

Two Pointers

Use two indices moving inward or in the same direction to reduce O(n²) to O(n).

  • 125. Valid PalindromeEasy
  • 167. Two Sum II - Input Array Is SortedMedium
  • 15. 3SumMedium
  • 11. Container With Most WaterMedium
  • 26. Remove Duplicates from Sorted ArrayEasy
  • 283. Move ZeroesEasy
  • 75. Sort ColorsMedium

Sliding Window

Maintain a window of elements and expand/shrink it to satisfy constraints.

  • 121. Best Time to Buy and Sell StockEasy
  • 3. Longest Substring Without Repeating CharactersMedium
  • 424. Longest Repeating Character ReplacementMedium
  • 567. Permutation in StringMedium
  • 76. Minimum Window SubstringHard
  • 239. Sliding Window MaximumHard
  • 643. Maximum Average Subarray IEasy

Hashing

Hash maps and sets enable O(1) lookups, turning many O(n²) brute-force solutions into O(n).

  • 1. Two SumEasy
  • 49. Group AnagramsMedium
  • 347. Top K Frequent ElementsMedium
  • 271. Encode and Decode StringsMedium
  • 128. Longest Consecutive SequenceMedium
  • 290. Word PatternEasy
  • 205. Isomorphic StringsEasy

Stacks & Queues

LIFO and FIFO structures. Monotonic stacks solve next-greater-element patterns efficiently.

  • 20. Valid ParenthesesEasy
  • 155. Min StackMedium
  • 150. Evaluate Reverse Polish NotationMedium
  • 22. Generate ParenthesesMedium
  • 739. Daily TemperaturesMedium
  • 853. Car FleetMedium
  • 84. Largest Rectangle in HistogramHard
  • 232. Implement Queue Using StacksEasy

Trees

Binary trees, BSTs, and tries. Master DFS (recursive & iterative) and BFS (level order).

  • 226. Invert Binary TreeEasy
  • 104. Maximum Depth of Binary TreeEasy
  • 543. Diameter of Binary TreeEasy
  • 110. Balanced Binary TreeEasy
  • 100. Same TreeEasy
  • 102. Binary Tree Level Order TraversalMedium
  • 235. Lowest Common Ancestor of a BSTMedium
  • 199. Binary Tree Right Side ViewMedium
  • 1448. Count Good Nodes in Binary TreeMedium
  • 98. Validate Binary Search TreeMedium
  • 230. Kth Smallest Element in a BSTMedium
  • 105. Construct Binary Tree from Preorder and Inorder TraversalMedium
  • 124. Binary Tree Maximum Path SumHard
  • 297. Serialize and Deserialize Binary TreeHard
  • 208. Implement Trie (Prefix Tree)Medium

Graphs

DFS/BFS on adjacency lists or grids. Know Union-Find, Topological Sort, and Dijkstra.

  • 200. Number of IslandsMedium
  • 133. Clone GraphMedium
  • 695. Max Area of IslandMedium
  • 417. Pacific Atlantic Water FlowMedium
  • 130. Surrounded RegionsMedium
  • 994. Rotting OrangesMedium
  • 286. Walls and GatesMedium
  • 207. Course ScheduleMedium
  • 210. Course Schedule IIMedium
  • 684. Redundant ConnectionMedium
  • 323. Number of Connected Components in an Undirected GraphMedium
  • 127. Word LadderHard
  • 743. Network Delay TimeMedium

Dynamic Programming

Optimal substructure + overlapping subproblems. Start with recursion + memoization, then convert to tabulation.

  • 70. Climbing StairsEasy
  • 746. Min Cost Climbing StairsEasy
  • 198. House RobberMedium
  • 213. House Robber IIMedium
  • 5. Longest Palindromic SubstringMedium
  • 647. Palindromic SubstringsMedium
  • 91. Decode WaysMedium
  • 322. Coin ChangeMedium
  • 152. Maximum Product SubarrayMedium
  • 139. Word BreakMedium
  • 300. Longest Increasing SubsequenceMedium
  • 416. Partition Equal Subset SumMedium
  • 62. Unique PathsMedium
  • 55. Jump GameMedium
  • 72. Edit DistanceHard
  • 312. Burst BalloonsHard

Greedy

Make the locally optimal choice at each step. Prove correctness by exchange argument or induction.

  • 55. Jump GameMedium
  • 45. Jump Game IIMedium
  • 134. Gas StationMedium
  • 846. Hand of StraightsMedium
  • 1899. Merge Triplets to Form Target TripletMedium
  • 763. Partition LabelsMedium
  • 678. Valid Parenthesis StringMedium

Backtracking

Explore all possibilities via recursion, pruning branches that can't lead to a valid solution.

  • 78. SubsetsMedium
  • 39. Combination SumMedium
  • 40. Combination Sum IIMedium
  • 46. PermutationsMedium
  • 90. Subsets IIMedium
  • 79. Word SearchMedium
  • 131. Palindrome PartitioningMedium
  • 17. Letter Combinations of a Phone NumberMedium
  • 51. N-QueensHard

Sorting & Searching

Binary search reduces search space by half each iteration — O(log n). Know it cold for arrays and answer-space problems.

  • 704. Binary SearchEasy
  • 74. Search a 2D MatrixMedium
  • 875. Koko Eating BananasMedium
  • 153. Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted ArrayMedium
  • 33. Search in Rotated Sorted ArrayMedium
  • 981. Time Based Key-Value StoreMedium
  • 4. Median of Two Sorted ArraysHard
  • 912. Sort an Array (Merge Sort / Quick Sort)Medium
  • 215. Kth Largest Element in an ArrayMedium

Bit Manipulation

XOR, AND, OR, shifts. XOR is your friend — it cancels duplicates and finds differences.

  • 191. Number of 1 BitsEasy
  • 338. Counting BitsEasy
  • 190. Reverse BitsEasy
  • 268. Missing NumberEasy
  • 136. Single NumberEasy
  • 371. Sum of Two IntegersMedium
  • 7. Reverse IntegerMedium

System Design Basics

High-level design problems. Know how to scale, how to pick storage, and how to reason about trade-offs (CAP theorem, consistency vs availability).

Key Concepts

  • Horizontal vs Vertical Scaling
  • Load Balancers (Round Robin, Least Connections)
  • SQL vs NoSQL trade-offs
  • Caching strategies (LRU, Write-through, Write-back)
  • CDN and edge caching
  • Message Queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ)
  • Database Sharding and Replication
  • CAP Theorem
  • Rate Limiting (Token Bucket, Leaky Bucket)
  • Consistent Hashing

Common Design Questions

  • Design a URL Shortener (TinyURL)
  • Design Twitter / News Feed
  • Design a Key-Value Store
  • Design a Web Crawler
  • Design YouTube / Video Streaming
  • Design a Chat System (WhatsApp)
  • Design a Notification System
  • Design an API Rate Limiter
  • Design a Distributed Cache (Redis)
  • Design a Search Autocomplete System
